name: aiden-workspace
description: Your AIDEN (clicktrackerx.com) workspace from Claude: tasks, projects, teams, vault, calendar, and assets via the /aiden-workspace:aiden command + MCP tools (OAuth login, no key). Project modules included: Q&A (ask/answer questions across users), roadmap/feature plan (propose, ship, convert to task), RAID log (risks/issues/decisions), and stakeholder status updates. Plus /aiden-workspace:aiden-vault for credentials and /aiden-workspace:aiden-assets for files/folders/versions/approval and project contacts. Optional per-branch session auto-logging (needs a per-user key).
